prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-CONSTRUCTIONCARSET-50PC Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 50pc City Construction Diecast Toy Cars Playset with Floor Mat, Yellow, Boys Description: Calling all little engineers and builders. The Kidplokio 50pc City Construction Diecast Toy Cars Playset for kids comes with 50 different toy cars and construction accessories to play with, plus an awesome city floor mat for hours of pretend play throughout an urban jungle. The playset includes a variety of pieces to play with, such as a dump truck, a semi hauler truck, bulldozers, cars, motorcycles, accessories and more. A great value toy car playset that kids can use in conjunction with other toy cars too.

Designed with small hands in mind, these car toys are excellent toys for little ones to develop their fine motor skills, dexterity and hand eye coordination while handling the race cars; and, not only are they toy cars great for kids' physical development, the cars will encourage lots of imaginative cosplay and pretend play too. Children's imaginations will race, as they create their own construction sites, city driving adventures, refuel with gas and more. The 40pc diecast toy cars playset also comes with a 21 x 26 inch city map, so kids can drive the construction toys around town. Featured on the map are buildings including a school, police station, fire station, bus station, hospital and more, for lots of pretend play pit stops. Family trips far away or neighbor next door play dates, the diecast toy cars are lightweight and easy to carry from one place to the next, without too much extra added weight or bulk; With vibrant colors and super cool decals, this car set will have your little one’s engine (and imagination) revving, whether at home or on the go. Made from safe, high quality materials, so parents need not worry. Let the building begin.

Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts)

Recommended Ages: 3+ Search Terms: urban construction toys boys kids toys Christmas gift Hanukkah gifts toy vehicles car accessories learning and education toys semi truck toy pretend play dump truck pretend play cosplay playroom Features: - URBAN CITY CONSTRUCTION TOYS PLAYSET: Calling little builders and engineers! The Kidplokio 50pc City Construction Diecast Toy Cars Playset for kids comes with 50 different toy cars and toy trucks to choose from, plus an awesome city themed floor mat for hours of building and driving pretend play across an urban jungle! - ENDLESS PRETEND PLAY POSSIBILITIES: Recreate the hustle and bustle of a busy city construction job site! Whether it's directing traffic, unloading supplies or pouring cement, this construction toys diecast vehicles playset the will have engines and imaginations revving! - FUN CITY THEMED FLOOR MAT: The 50pc construction themed diecast toy cars playset comes with a 21 x 26 inch city map, so little ones can drive all the different toy cars and toy trucks around town! Featured on the map are a school, police station, fire station, bus station, hospital and more, for lots of pretend play pit stops - FINE MOTOR SKILLS TOYS: Designed with small hands in mind, these car toys for boys are excellent for little ones to develop fine motor skills and hand eye coordination; and, not only are handling and playing with the toy cars great for their physical development, the cars will encourage lots of imaginative cosplay too! - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 20 x 14 x 1.5 inches; Color: Multicolor; Material: Plastic, Metal; Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts); Age: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
